debug_info.goal:
U V : Type

b : V
f : U → V
h1 : one_one_on f A
h2 : image f A = B
h3 : a ∈ A
h4 : f a = b
⊢ ↑(A \ {a}) ∼ ↑(B \ {b})

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
by

    have hfxB : f x.val ∈ B := by rw [←h2]; exact ⟨x.val, hxA, rfl⟩

    have := Classical.choose_spec (by exact hy)
    apply And.intro
    · apply And.intro this.left
      define; intro hua; define at hua
      apply hyb; rw [←hfu, ←h4, hua]
      exact h1 this.left h3
    · rw [←hfu]; exact this.right⟩)
  apply And.intro <;> funext x <;> simp <;> apply Subtype.eq <;> simp
  · have := Classical.choose_spec (by rw [←h2]; exact x.property.left)

    have hfx := Classical.choose_spec (by rw [←h2]; exact ⟨x.val, hxA, rfl⟩)
    exact h1 hfx.left hxA hfx.right
